category_sources: source_facts.description says modular Internet censorship circumvention system; official geph4-client README says Geph is designed to deal with national filtering.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is geph4; official GitHub repository is geph4-client and describes it as the command-line Geph client.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, and subcommand documentation; official GitHub wiki documents how Geph works.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/geph-official/geph4-client; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official geph4-client README describe filtering circumvention, proxies, VPN packet forwarding, and a command-line client.
